Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore, including build artifacts and node modules.

# Purpose
The file specifies patterns for files and directories that should be ignored by version control systems. It includes directories such as `build/`, `dist/`, and `node_modules/`, as well as files like `dist.zip` and any file matching the pattern `.lock-waf*`. This helps to exclude build artifacts, dependencies, and lock files from being tracked.
